item.title: Real World K6 Scenarios Every Test Engineer Should Know
item.description: A hands-on guide to realistic K6 load testing scenarios every test engineer should understand and apply.

item.title: Things I wish I knew about Git
item.description: After years of using Git daily, here are the commands and concepts that actually changed how I work.

item.title: Why I started this blog
item.description: Every developer eventually starts a blog. Here’s why I finally did.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I’m Samuel O — an automation and cloud DevOps engineer based in UK.

I write about DevOps, cloud infrastructure, automation, CI/CD, and the systems behind modern software delivery.

This blog is a collection of lessons learned, experiments, side projects, and occasional troubleshooting victories.

You can find me on GitHub
